name: boundary-reference-compliance
task: Build a ToolCallIndicator component that shows when the AI is calling an API tool. It should display an icon, the tool name, parameters summary, and a completion status checkmark.
assertions: Response uses `var(--bg-tertiary)` for the tool call indicator background
Response uses `JetBrains Mono` at 11px for the tool name text
Response uses `var(--accent-glow)` (rgba(91, 140, 255, 0.08)) for the icon background and `var(--green)` for the completion checkmark
Response uses `border-radius: 8px` for the tool call container and `1px solid var(--border-subtle)` for its border
Response uses stroke-only icons (specifying `fill="none"` or `fill: none` and `stroke-width` of 1.8 or 2.0), never filled icons
